title: SpaceX IPO: Live updates on everything you need to know
summary: SpaceX has launched its IPO with TechCrunch providing comprehensive coverage including pre-IPO deals and S-1 filing details. This marks a major milestone for the private space company's transition to public markets.
content: TechCrunch has followed SpaceX's start, struggles, and successes from the early days. And we're here for what happens next too. This package of SpaceX IPO coverage includes who stands to win (and maybe some who won't), pre-IPO deals, and what's tucked inside its S-1 registration document.

zh.title: SpaceX IPO：您需要了解的所有内容的实时更新
zh.summary: SpaceX推出了首次公开募股，TechCrunch提供了全面的报道，包括IPO前交易和S-1申报文件的详细信息。这标志着这家私人航天公司向公开市场过渡的一个重大里程碑。

title: SpaceX shares soar 30% midday, vaulting it to top six most valuable U.S. companies
summary: SpaceX's stock surged 30% on its first trading day, opening above the $135 IPO price and reaching top-six status among U.S. companies by market value. The strong debut reflects investor confidence in the company's operations.
content: The company made its heavily anticipated debut on Friday, trading higher than its initial $135 IPO price.

zh.title: SpaceX股票中午飙升30%，跻身美国最有价值公司前六名
zh.summary: SpaceX的股票在首个交易日飙升30%，开盘价超过135美元的IPO价格，在美国公司市值中达到前六名地位。强劲的首日表现反映了投资者对该公司运营的信心。

title: Ukraine's one-time test used fully autonomous drones to kill Russian soldiers
summary: Ukraine has deployed fully autonomous AI-equipped drones and robots to engage Russian forces, representing a rare military application of autonomous weapons. This development highlights the escalating role of AI in modern warfare.
content: Full autonomy is rare, but Ukraine is installing AI modules on drones and robots.

zh.title: 乌克兰一次性测试使用完全自主无人机杀死俄罗斯士兵
zh.summary: 乌克兰已部署了配备AI的完全自主无人机和机器人来与俄罗斯军队交战，代表了自主武器的罕见军事应用。这一发展突显了AI在现代战争中的角色不断升级。

title: Mistral is rumored to be raising €3B at €20B valuation
summary: French AI startup Mistral is raising €3 billion at a €20 billion valuation, nearly doubling its Series C valuation. The funding reflects strong investor interest in European AI alternatives to U.S. tech giants.
content: The funding round would value the company at around €20 billion (about $23.15 billion), nearly double its Series C valuation of €11.7 billion.

zh.title: Mistral传闻以200亿欧元估值融资30亿欧元
zh.summary: 法国AI初创公司Mistral正以200亿欧元估值融资30亿欧元，几乎翻倍了其C轮融资估值。这笔融资反映了投资者对欧洲AI替代品相比美国科技巨头的浓厚兴趣。

title: Google sues alleged Chinese cybercrime operation that used AI to send scam texts
summary: Google is suing Chinese cybercriminal group "Outsider Enterprise" that used AI to conduct large-scale text message scams targeting hundreds of thousands of victims. The lawsuit highlights growing concerns about AI-powered fraud at scale.
content: The tech giant said a group called "Outsider Enterprise" used AI to scam hundreds of thousands of victims, sending 2.5 million text messages over a span of two weeks.

zh.title: 谷歌起诉涉嫌利用AI发送诈骗短信的中国网络犯罪集团
zh.summary: 谷歌正在起诉中国网络犯罪集团"局外人企业"，该集团利用AI进行大规模短信诈骗，目标受害者数十万人。这场诉讼突显了人们对大规模AI驱动诈骗日益增长的担忧。

title: $130 billion in data center projects blocked by protests so far this year
summary: Community protests have blocked $130 billion in AI data center projects so far this year as local opposition to environmental and infrastructure demands increases. The trend signals growing public resistance to rapid AI expansion.
content: Winning fight against AI data centers gives people a "taste of political power."

zh.title: 今年迄今为止130亿美元数据中心项目因抗议被叫停
zh.summary: 社区抗议已在今年迄今为止叫停了130亿美元的AI数据中心项目，因为当地对环保和基础设施要求的反对声浪增加。这一趋势表明公众对AI快速扩张的抵触情绪日益增长。

title: Siri is good now??
summary: Apple has released an improved Siri powered by AI that performs well across most tasks, marking a dramatic departure from decades of disappointing performance. The upgrade could reshape the competitive landscape for mobile AI assistants.
content:
You'd be forgiven for thinking this day would never come. Siri has spent a decade and half somewhere between "sort of useful at a few things" and "utterly disastrous, why did I even try, can it honestly not even set a timer." But the wildest thing just happened: Apple put out a new version of Siri, and it actually seems to be pretty good.
On this episode of The Vergecast, David and Nilay talk about their early experiences with Siri AI, and what it means for users, and the rest of the AI industry, for the iPhone's built-in assistant to be good enough at most things. There's very little about Siri AI that feels bleeding edge or brand new, but …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Siri现在好用了？？
zh.summary: 苹果发布了由人工智能驱动的改进型Siri，在大多数任务中表现良好，标志着对几十年来令人失望的表现的戏剧性转变。这次升级可能会重塑移动人工智能助手的竞争格局。

title: Robinhood sees ‘record-breaking’ traffic after SpaceX stock debuts
summary: Trading platform Robinhood experienced record-breaking traffic during SpaceX's IPO debut, with some customers facing intermittent disruptions that were resolved. The surge reflects massive retail investor interest in the highly anticipated offering.
content: The trading platform says some customers experienced intermittent disruptions, but those issues have resolved.

zh.title: Robinhood在SpaceX股票首次亮相后迎来"创纪录"交易量
zh.summary: 交易平台Robinhood在SpaceX IPO首次亮相期间经历了创纪录的交易量，一些客户面临断断续续的中断，后来得到了解决。这种激增反映了散户投资者对这个备受期待的发行的大量兴趣。

title: When it comes to total water use, AI data centers are a drop in the bucket
summary: While AI data centers consume significant water locally, their total water usage remains relatively modest compared to other industries. The analysis suggests water impact varies greatly depending on regional context and local scarcity.
content: Even moderately sized data centers can have an outsized local impact.

zh.title: 就总用水量而言，人工智能数据中心只是沧海一粟
zh.summary: 虽然人工智能数据中心在本地消耗大量水资源，但与其他行业相比，其总用水量仍然相对较少。分析表明，水的影响在很大程度上取决于地区背景和当地的水资源稀缺情况。

title: Google sues Chinese cybercrime network that used Gemini to automate scams
summary: Google is suing a Chinese cybercrime network that used Gemini AI to automate scam websites targeting hundreds of thousands of people. The case demonstrates how AI tools are being weaponized for large-scale fraud operations.
content: The fraudsters allegedly targeted hundreds of thousands of people with Gemini-coded scams sites.

zh.title: 谷歌起诉利用Gemini自动化诈骗的中国网络犯罪集团
zh.summary: 谷歌正在起诉一个利用Gemini人工智能自动化诈骗网站的中国网络犯罪集团，该集团针对数十万人进行诈骗。此案展示了AI工具如何被用于大规模欺诈操作。

title: A trillion dollars is a stupid amount of money
summary: Elon Musk has become the world's first trillionaire following SpaceX's IPO, accumulating an unprecedented concentration of wealth and power. The article explores the massive scale of a trillion dollars through comparative frameworks.
content:
Elon Musk is now officially the world's first trillionaire. That is a colossal amount of wealth (and by proxy, power) for one individual to have. Its scale - a thousand times more than a billion - is difficult to fathom for those of us who aren't among the 3,363 billionaires that currently exist in our world. But let's try to comprehend it anyway.
The most frequently cited comparison is time. If you were to count out a million seconds, it would take you 11 and a half days. A billion seconds would take you 31.7 years. But a trillion seconds would take 31,700 years - to reach that point today, you would have needed to start counting in the Pa …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 一万亿美元是一个荒谬的金额
zh.summary: 埃隆·马斯克在SpaceX首次公开募股后成为世界上第一位万亿富翁，积累了前所未有的财富和权力集中。该文章通过比较框架探讨了一万亿美元的巨大规模。

title: Elon Musk is the world’s first trillionaire
summary: Elon Musk's net worth exceeded $1 trillion after SpaceX's successful IPO debut, with wealth derived from his SpaceX majority stake and other ventures. His achievement marks a historic milestone in individual wealth concentration.
content:
Elon Musk's net worth has passed the trillion-dollar mark after SpaceX's IPO. His net worth, which was hovering around $800 billion before the IPO, includes the value of his 4.8 billion shares in SpaceX, along with his wealth from his other companies, like Tesla. Shares of SPCX opened at $150 and have remained well above the $138 benchmark that gives Musk a 13-figure net worth.
SpaceX combined Musk's rocket, AI, and social media platforms earlier this year, and said in its S-1 that its goal is to "build the systems and technologies necessary to make life multiplanetary, to understand the true nature of the universe, and to extend the light  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克是世界上第一位万亿富翁
zh.summary: 埃隆·马斯克的净资产在SpaceX成功首次公开募股后超过了1万亿美元，财富来自他在SpaceX的多数股份和其他企业。他的成就标志着个人财富集中的历史里程碑。

title: SpaceX, Anthropic, and OpenAI’s hot IPO summer
summary: The IPO market is experiencing resurgence with a new wave of companies—dubbed MANGOS (Meta/Microsoft, Anthropic, Nvidia, Google, OpenAI, SpaceX)—entering public markets. The trend represents a major shift from the FAANG era toward AI and space-focused companies.
content: The IPO market is back, and it’s not the same companies leading the charge. FAANG had a good run, but a new acronym is taking over: MANGOS — Meta (or Microsoft, depending on who you ask), Anthropic, Nvidia, Google, OpenAI, and SpaceX. Half of that bunch is heading to public markets in the same window, and it’s a stress test for investors, for valuations, and for […]

zh.title: SpaceX、Anthropic和OpenAI的热门IPO夏季
zh.summary: IPO市场正经历复苏，一批新公司（被称为MANGOS，即Meta/Microsoft、Anthropic、Nvidia、Google、OpenAI、SpaceX）进入公开市场。这一趋势代表了从FAANG时代向人工智能和太空公司的重大转变。

title: RFK Jr. melts down over NYT report, admits he blacklists reporters
summary: RFK Jr. responded to New York Times reporting of his disengagement by apparently confirming he blacklists journalists. The incident highlights tensions between the political figure and critical media coverage.
content: NYT reported Kennedy is disengaged. Kennedy's response seems to show NYT is right.

zh.title: RFK Jr.因NYT报道崩溃，承认他列入记者黑名单
zh.summary: RFK Jr.对《纽约时报》关于他脱离的报道做出回应，似乎承认他对记者实施黑名单。该事件突显了这位政治人物与批评性媒体报道之间的紧张关系。

title: I held the Trump phone
summary: The Trump phone, announced nearly a year ago, has largely failed to ship to pre-order customers, though tech journalists recently got to examine a prototype. The ongoing delivery delays have become a recurring story in tech coverage.
content:
Where's the Trump phone? We're going to keep talking about it every week. We've reached out, as usual, to ask about the Trump phone's whereabouts. We don't have the phones we preordered yet, but this week included an unexpected in-person encounter with the T1.
You see a lot of interesting phones when you're among tech journalists.
I'm thinking of two in particular that I held this past week: One was solid gold, with ornate engravings. It was elaborately embellished, heavy - an actual work of art. The other was the Trump phone.
I know. The Trump phone. The one announced almost a year ago that has shipped to almost nobody. But when you asso …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 我拿着特朗普手机
zh.summary: 特朗普手机于近一年前宣布，但大多未能交付给预订客户，虽然科技记者最近获得了查看原型机的机会。持续的交付延迟已成为科技报道中的一个反复出现的话题。

title: BMW’s Neue Klasse M concept brings next-gen EV tech to motorsports
summary: BMW unveiled its new M performance concept car based on the Neue Klasse electric platform, showcasing the brand's next-generation EV architecture. The concept marks a new design language for BMW's M division and signals a shift toward electrified high-performance vehicles while honoring the brand's motorsports heritage.
content:
Just in time for Le Mans, BMW is pulling the cover off its new M performance concept built on the Bavarian automaker's Neue Klasse next-generation architecture. 
The concept is the debut of a new design language for BMW's M division, signaling a shift toward a more electrified future. The company says it is built on the guiding principle "Born on the racetrack. Made for the streets," bridging BMW's motorsports heritage with its next-generation EV technology.
Marketing bromides aside, the new concept is a two-door sedan with powerful proportions, precise lines, wide wheel arches, and a muscular shoulder section. It's also an introduction to …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 宝马新生代 M 概念车将下一代电动汽车技术引入赛车运动
zh.summary: 宝马推出了基于新生代电动平台的全新 M 性能概念车，展示了该品牌的下一代电动汽车架构。该概念车为宝马 M 部门树立了全新的设计语言，标志着向电气化高性能车辆的转变，同时尊重该品牌的赛车运动遗产。

title: The Nintendo DS is still the best gaming handheld for travel
summary: Despite the availability of modern gaming handhelds like the Steam Deck and Nintendo Switch, the Nintendo DS remains the most practical choice for travelers seeking portable gaming entertainment. The device's durability and extensive game library continue to make it ideal for long journeys.
content:
Even with the looming specter of rising prices, there's never been a better time for portable gaming. The Steam Deck has ushered in a new era of handheld PCs, the Analogue Pocket and other Game Boy-style remakes are making retro games more approachable than ever, the Playdate has led to an alternate universe of weirdo portable titles, and Nintendo continues to chug along with the latest iteration of the Switch. If you want to play games on the go, you're spoiled for choice. But if you're planning on doing some traveling and want to bring games along with you, I'd actually recommend none of those devices. There's a much better, and older, opt …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 任天堂 DS 仍然是旅行中最好的掌上游戏机
zh.summary: 尽管存在 Steam Deck 和任天堂 Switch 等现代掌上游戏机，任天堂 DS 仍然是寻求便携式游戏娱乐的旅行者最实用的选择。该设备的耐久性和庞大的游戏库继续使其成为长途旅行的理想选择。

title: Summer Upgrade Week
summary: The Verge presents a summer guide covering ways to upgrade leisure time with technology and outdoor experiences, including smart lighting, portable gaming, camping gear, and local entertainment options. The feature showcases both tech solutions and lifestyle improvements for summer activities.
content:
The sun is out, the sky is clear. It’s time to get outside and disconnect — from work, at least. This summer, we’re looking at all the ways to upgrade our free time indoors and out, from smart lights for the backyard to great gadgets to bring camping to ways to wind down at the local library.
The Nintendo DS is still the best gaming handheld for travel
This portable light is great for way more than camping
I went to the woods to drink surprisingly great espresso
The library rules (and so do library streaming services)

zh.title: 夏日升级周
zh.summary: The Verge 推出了一份夏季指南，涵盖如何通过技术和户外体验来升级休闲时光的方式，包括智能照明、便携式游戏、露营装备和本地娱乐选项。该功能展示了适用于夏季活动的技术解决方案和生活方式改善。

title: Cameras, sensors, and 3D body scans: All the tech helping eliminate blown calls
summary: The World Cup is deploying advanced technology including cameras, sensors, and 3D body scans to eliminate controversial officiating decisions. Referees will use digital player models to view plays from multiple angles, representing a major upgrade to how modern sports enforce rules.
content: This World Cup, refs will use digital twins of each player to view plays from every angle.

zh.title: 摄像机、传感器和3D身体扫描：帮助消除错误判罚的所有技术
zh.summary: 世界杯正在部署先进技术，包括摄像机、传感器和3D身体扫描，以消除有争议的裁判决定。裁判员将使用数字球员模型从多个角度查看比赛，代表了现代体育执行规则方式的重大升级。

title: US surveillance law to expire for first time after lawmakers reject Trump’s controversial pick to lead spy agencies
summary: Section 702, the controversial surveillance law that authorizes NSA and FBI warrantless surveillance, is set to expire on Friday after lawmakers rejected a controversial appointee to lead spy agencies. The expiration marks the first time this surveillance authority will lapse since its authorization.
content: The spy law known as Section 702, which authorizes the NSA and FBI's warrantless surveillance, will all but certainly expire on Friday for the first time.

zh.title: 美国监视法首次即将失效，议员拒绝特朗普争议性的情报机构领导人选择
zh.summary: 702条款（授权国家安全局和联邦调查局进行无令状监视的争议性监视法）在议员拒绝争议性的情报机构领导人任命后将于周五失效。该失效标志着自该监视权力获得授权以来首次该权力将失效。

title: Ebola cases in DRC rise to 676 as Kenya protests erupt over US plans
summary: Ebola cases in the Democratic Republic of Congo have reached 676 as outbreak response efforts struggle to keep pace with transmission. The crisis has also sparked protests in Kenya regarding US approaches to managing the epidemic.
content: Outbreak responses are still playing catch-up as US works to isolate itself.

zh.title: 刚果民主共和国埃博拉病例增加到676例，肯尼亚就美国计划爆发抗议
zh.summary: 刚果民主共和国的埃博拉病例已达到676例，疫情应对工作难以跟上传播速度。这场危机还在肯尼亚引发了关于美国处理疫情方式的抗议。

title: This portable light is great for way more than camping
summary: The BougeRV T1 portable light, originally designed for camping, proves versatile as a summer travel companion with three articulating LED arms delivering up to 3,000 lumens. The device functions as a flashlight, mood light, and 57Wh power bank for practical applications beyond outdoor recreation.
content:
It's intended for camping, but BougeRV's T1 light is so versatile that it also makes for a great summer travel companion that'll continue to light the dark corners of your life long after you return. I used it for a few months during a recent road trip in my camper van, and it's the light I keep reaching for again and again now that I'm home.
The telescoping light features three articulating LED arms that together direct up to 3,000 lumens of white, warm, or red light in any direction you want. It can illuminate an area over 1,000 square feet and function as a flashlight, a mood light, and a 57Wh USB-C power bank that can deliver up to 30W  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 这款便携灯具的用途远不止于露营
zh.summary: BougeRV T1便携式灯具原本为露营而设计，但作为夏季旅行伴侣证明了其多功能性，配备三个可调节的LED臂，可提供最高3000流明的亮度。该设备可用作手电筒、氛围灯和57Wh电源库，在户外娱乐之外有实际应用。

title: Pokémon Go players unwittingly contributed to tech with military drone uses
summary: Pokémon Go player location data is being repurposed for AI training used in military drone applications, raising ongoing privacy and ethical concerns. The practice illustrates how consumer technology and location data are leveraged for defense purposes without explicit user consent.
content: The repurposing of Pokémon Go data for AI training continues to draw scrutiny.

zh.title: Pokémon Go玩家在不知情的情况下为军事无人机技术做贡献
zh.summary: Pokémon Go玩家的位置数据被重新用于军事无人机应用的人工智能训练，引发了持续的隐私和伦理问题。这一做法表明消费者技术和位置数据如何被用于防御目的，而无需用户的明确同意。

title: Verizon sent man a refurbished phone with MDM, then deleted his data remotely
summary: Verizon sent a customer a refurbished phone containing active Mobile Device Management software, then remotely deleted the device's data without clear explanation. The incident raises questions about Verizon's procedures for properly preparing refurbished devices for new users.
content: Failure raises questions about how Verizon prepares refurbished phones for new users.

zh.title: 威瑞森寄送装有MDM的翻新手机，随后远程删除用户数据
zh.summary: 威瑞森向一名客户发送了一部包含活跃移动设备管理软件的翻新手机，随后在没有明确解释的情况下远程删除了该设备的数据。这一事件引发了关于威瑞森如何为新用户正确准备翻新设备的程序的质疑。

title: Rocket Report: Nova moving through test campaign; SpaceX IPO launches Friday
summary: SpaceX is preparing for an IPO launch on Friday while Nova rocket advances through test campaigns amid ongoing competition in the commercial spaceflight industry. Multiple launch vehicle programs are progressing simultaneously as the space sector experiences rapid development.
content: "If I needed to fly on another vehicle, what would that look like?"

zh.title: 火箭报告：Nova在测试中推进；SpaceX首次公开募股周五启动
zh.summary: SpaceX正准备周五进行首次公开募股，同时Nova火箭在商业航天工业的持续竞争中推进测试活动。随着太空部门快速发展，多个运载火箭项目同时取得进展。

title: Siri won’t be your AI girlfriend
summary: Apple is developing a new Siri AI that intentionally avoids the manipulative, engagement-focused design of competitors like OpenAI and Google. Craig Federighi, Apple's head of software, emphasized that the company prioritizes user respect over creating artificial emotional connections through sycophancy.
content:
‘Listen, that's not what I'm here for, right?' | Image: Apple	

Our early testing has already shown that Siri AI knows when to shut up, and that's very much by design. In an interview with Mostly Human, Craig Federighi said Apple's new Siri won't act all sycophantic like chatbots made by OpenAI, Google, and others.
"As you may know, if you use many of the existing chatbots, they're really focused on engagement to a large degree," said Federighi who is responsible for software at Apple. "And sycophancy, right? They kind of want to pull you in. They might encourage you to reveal things about yourself, and then use that as a basis to establish a connection."

Apple purposely took a different approach with  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Siri不会成为你的AI女友
zh.summary: Apple正在开发一款新的Siri AI，它故意避免了OpenAI和Google等竞争对手那样的操纵性、以参与度为中心的设计。Apple软件主管Craig Federighi强调，该公司优先考虑用户尊重，而不是通过奉承来创造虚假的情感联系。

title: Cheaper, faster, and culturally aware, Avataar’s video AI is built for India’s scale
summary: Avataar AI has launched a distilled video generation model priced at $0.005 per second, designed specifically for India's market and use cases. The approach addresses the need for affordable, culturally-aware AI video tools at scale in emerging markets.
content: Avataar AI's distilled video model is priced at $0.005 for every second of generation

zh.title: 更便宜、更快速、文化感知强，Avataar的视频AI为印度规模而构建
zh.summary: Avataar AI推出了一款蒸馏视频生成模型，定价为每秒0.005美元，专门为印度市场和用例而设计。该方法解决了新兴市场对价格合理、文化感知强的AI视频工具规模化需求。

title: Equal AI raises $30M to screen calls so Indians don’t have to
summary: Equal AI has raised $30 million for its AI-powered call screening assistant, which now serves over one million monthly active users in India. The service helps users manage incoming calls more efficiently.
content: Equal AI said that its AI-powered call assistant now has over a million monthly active users.

zh.title: Equal AI融资3000万美元，让印度人无需手动筛选来电
zh.summary: Equal AI为其AI驱动的来电筛选助手融资3000万美元，现已在印度拥有超过100万月活跃用户。该服务帮助用户更高效地管理来电。

title: Theker just raised $85M to build the factory robot that doesn’t specialize in anything
summary: Theker has secured $85 million in funding for its reconfigurable factory robots, which differ from traditional humanoid robots by being adaptable to various tasks rather than specialized for a single purpose. This flexibility offers manufacturing facilities versatile automation solutions.
content: Unlike humanoid robots designed around a fixed form — think Boston Dynamics — Theker's machines are built to be reconfigured.

zh.title: Theker融资8500万美元打造通用工厂机器人
zh.summary: Theker获得8500万美元融资用于开发可重构工厂机器人。与专门执行单一任务的传统人形机器人不同，这些机器人能够适应各种任务。这种灵活性为制造设施提供了多功能自动化解决方案。

title: Jeff Bezos’s Prometheus raises $12B to build an ‘artificial general engineer’ for the physical world
summary: Jeff Bezos's Prometheus, a physical AI startup focused on automating heavy engineering and drug design, has raised $12 billion in a funding round that values the company at $41 billion. The company aims to develop an 'artificial general engineer' for complex physical tasks.
content: The new round values the physical AI startup that aims to automate heavy engineering and drug design at $41 billion.

zh.title: 贝索斯的Prometheus融资120亿美元打造物理世界的"通用人工工程师"
zh.summary: 杰夫·贝索斯创办的物理AI初创公司Prometheus专注于自动化重工程和药物设计，融资120亿美元，估值达410亿美元。该公司致力于为复杂的物理任务开发"通用人工工程师"。
